race.comment: BRAVE IN SEATTLE (5) battled on well to hold second last start over 800m at Ipswich, beaten a neck as favourite. Finds the right race this time and can find winning ways. LUKEY BLUE (6) is back from a spell of 12 weeks. Closed last campaign with a minor placing over 1100m at Ipswich. Sure to make her presence felt. PAST MIDNIGHT (1) is a three-year-old gelding on debut from the stable of Jake Capewell. By Worthy Cause from Midnight Matinee. Proved too sharp in a recent Toowoomba Inner Track trial. Respect any positive move in betting. SWITCH THE STARS (2) has not raced since his debut on October 1 over 1000m at Eagle Farm when he finished fifth, beaten 7 lengths. This is easier and can run a race while fresh.
